commit.message:
fix: align 3D view coordinates with 2D map using dynamic airport center

Replace two incompatible coordinate systems (hardcoded SFO center at ~10k
scale for aircraft vs dynamic centroid at ~111k scale for OSM terminals)
with a single unified projection via latLonTo3D for all 3D elements.

Key changes:
- Add getAirportCenter() to config hook (centroid from OSM gates/terminals, SFO fallback)
- Aircraft3D/Trajectory3D use dynamic center instead of hardcoded SFO
- Terminal3D converts geoPolygon via latLonTo3D (same scale as aircraft)
- OSM runways/taxiways/aprons render in 3D from geoPoints via latLonTo3D
- Hardcoded SFO infrastructure only renders when no OSM data present
- Ground aircraft (altitude=0) sit at y=0.5 instead of y=5 (on surface)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Complete CPX-1-8 implementation (8 new features)

CPX-1: OPORD/FRAGO (SMESC) data model + editor
- shared/types/index.ts: OPORD/FRAGO type definitions
- backend/app/services/opord_service.py: OPORD CRUD service
- frontend: OPORD editor UI

CPX-2: Report format standardization
- shared/types/index.ts: SITREP/INTSUM/OPSUM/LOGSITREP/SALUTE types
- backend/app/services/report_generator.py: UnifiedReportGenerator

CPX-3: MGRS/APP-6 symbols integration
- shared/types/index.ts: MGRS/APP-6 types
- backend/app/services/grid_system.py: MGRS conversion, control measures
- frontend/app/lib/app6.ts: APP-6 symbol rendering

CPX-4: MEL/MIL (Inject) system + EXCON panel
- shared/types/index.ts: MEL/MIL types
- backend/app/services/inject_system.py: Inject CRUD + trigger system
- frontend/app/lib/excon-panel.tsx: EXCON panel UI

CPX-5: CCIR/PIR/ROE integration with adjudication
- shared/types/index.ts: CCIR/PIR/ROE types
- backend/app/services/arcade_adjudication.py: CCIR evaluation

CPX-6: Multi-role RBAC + real-time notifications
- shared/types/index.ts: Role types
- backend/app/services/rbac_service.py: RBAC service
- backend/app/services/notification_service.py: WebSocket notifications

CPX-7: Logistics model (Class III/V, supply routes)
- shared/types/index.ts: Logistics types
- backend/app/services/logistics_service.py: Supply node/route management

CPX-8: Reproducibility (RNG seed) + structured logging + AAR
- backend/app/services/rng_service.py: RNG seed management
- backend/app/services/structured_logging.py: Structured logging

All tests passing.

Add WorldView camera submission auto-reply to lead responder

lead_responder.py now detects camera submissions (city + youtube_url fields
from Formspree) alongside regular SaaS leads. Camera submitters get a
thank-you email and are logged with niche=camera-submission, source=worldview.ink.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: revert async battle loading to fix blank battle screen

The "load battle under transition" approach caused blank battles because
lambda-with-await lost context. Reverted to reliable sequential flow:
transition effect → black screen → load battle → fade out to reveal.

Midpoint signal now fires AFTER the effect (screen fully black), not before.
Battle loads while screen is covered, then iris-open/fade reveals it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve SC1091 with .shellcheckrc source-path=SCRIPTDIR

ShellCheck cannot evaluate ${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*} at static analysis
time, so -x alone fails to follow the _debug.sh source directive.
Adding source-path=SCRIPTDIR to .shellcheckrc tells ShellCheck to
resolve source paths relative to each script's directory.

Also fixes SC2034 (unused MAX_ACTIONS_PER_CYCLE) and SC2155 (declare
and assign separately) in autonomous-sync.sh, and adds scripts/*.sh
to CI coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix upload auth to use correct admin session check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Phase 5: Infrastructure & DevOps — 9 services + Prometheus/Grafana/Jaeger

Observability domain (5 services, ports 8190-8194):
- alerting-service: Alert rules, firing, routing, silencing
- health-check-service: Service probes, dependency graph, dashboard
- metrics-aggregation-service: Counters/gauges/histograms, aggregation
- log-aggregation-service: Structured log ingestion, querying, patterns
- trace-collector-service: Span collection, trace assembly, latency analysis

DevOps domain (4 services, ports 8195-8198):
- deployment-service: Blue-green/canary/rolling, rollback, promote
- slo-tracker-service: SLO definitions, error budgets, burn rate alerts
- synthetic-monitor-service: HTTP/DNS/TCP probes, uptime reports
- chaos-experiment-service: Fault injection, steady-state verification

Infrastructure:
- Prometheus v2.51 (port 9090) with scrape configs for all services
- Grafana v10.4 (port 3333) with auto-provisioned datasources
- Jaeger v1.55 (port 16686) for distributed tracing
- Shared observability library (metrics, tracing, logging, health)
- PostgreSQL devops schema (11 tables, 10 indexes)

K8s/Helm/Terraform:
- K8s manifests: 8 infrastructure deployments + Kustomize overlays (dev/staging/prod)
- Helm chart: mobility-platform with deployment, service, ingress, HPA templates
- Terraform modules: kubernetes-cluster, database, monitoring + environments

Learning modules M25-M30 (302 tests):
- M25 Kubernetes Fundamentals: Pod lifecycle, deployments, services, ingress
- M26 Helm & Kustomize: Template rendering, values merge, overlays, promotion
- M27 CI/CD Pipeline Design: Pipeline DAG, deployment strategies, rollback
- M28 Observability Stack: Metrics types, distributed tracing, log correlation
- M29 Service Mesh: Sidecar proxy, traffic routing, circuit breaker, mTLS
- M30 Infrastructure as Code: Resource graphs, state management, plan/apply

6 exercises: Pod scheduler, Helm renderer, canary deployment, metric aggregator,
circuit breaker state machine, Terraform planner (topological sort)

Total: 132 services (120 prior + 9 new + 3 infra), 452 new tests (150 service + 302 learning)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(opencode): unified release process with npm publishing (#72)

* feat(opencode): configure package.json for npm publishing

Rename to @obsidian-owl/opencode-specwright, add publishConfig.access
and files array for scoped npm distribution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(opencode): add auto-deploy logic to plugin.ts

Deploy skills, protocols, agents, and commands from the npm package to
project filesystem locations on version mismatch. Opencode doesn't
auto-discover assets from node_modules, so files are copied to
.specwright/ and .opencode/ directories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci(release): bump opencode package.json version in release workflow

Add step to update adapters/opencode/package.json version alongside
plugin.json and marketplace.json. Stage the file in the release PR.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci(release): add npm publish job to release-finalize workflow

Publish @obsidian-owl/opencode-specwright to npm after tag creation.
Builds fresh from merged main, checks for already-published version,
publishes with provenance attestation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci(validate): check opencode package.json version consistency

Extend version-consistency job to verify adapters/opencode/package.json
version matches plugin.json, catching version sync drift in PRs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review feedback — partial deploy, race condition, log levels

- Change deployedCount > 0 to deployedCount === mappings.length so partial
  deploys don't write .plugin-version (failed dirs will retry next load)
- Checkout tagged commit (not ref:main) in publish-npm job to prevent
  race condition where npm package diverges from git tag
- Use console.log for info messages, not console.error
- Remove brittle wc -l line-count test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: corregir crash EXC_BREAKPOINT en macOS 26 (Hardened Runtime)

macOS 15/26 con Hardened Runtime bloquea el JIT de V8 cuando la app
no tiene certificado Apple Developer, causando EXC_BREAKPOINT (SIGTRAP)
al arrancar. Desactivar hardenedRuntime permite que Electron funcione
correctamente con firma ad-hoc.

commit.message:
fix: route autonomous-sync log calls to stderr in captured functions

check_budget and run_sync both call log() which writes to stdout.
When their output is captured via $(...), log messages contaminate
the return value — budget becomes a multi-line string instead of
an integer, breaking downstream arithmetic and SQLite inserts.

Fix: redirect log calls to stderr (>&2) in functions whose stdout
serves as a return channel. Halt messages in check_budget switched
to err() which already targets stderr.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Align all layout and page HTML with the actual class names defined in
assets/css/main.css. The stylesheet uses a flat/hybrid BEM convention

hero__headline, service-detail-card, footer-grid, etc.) rather than the
fully-nested BEM names initially used in the templates.

  CSS checkbox mobile nav, site-footer/footer-grid/footer-col structure
- post.html: wrap content in post-content div, fix post-meta markup
- index.md: hero__headline, section__label/heading/subheading,
  feature-card__icon, cta-section structure, blog-card__body/date/link

commit.message:
Track E: frame-level content for raw/RLE+compLit two-block frames (#1079)

* feat: frame-level content for raw/RLE+compLit two-block frames (#1070)

Add two frame-level content theorems that lift existing block-level
compositions to the frame level:
- decompressFrame_raw_then_compressed_lit_content
- decompressFrame_rle_then_compressed_lit_content

Both follow the established frame-level proof pattern: derive block loop
offset bound, apply the block-level composition theorem, then unfold
decompressFrame and handle dictionary/checksum checks.

commit.message:
Bulletproof Ctrl+Q: handle every idle/stale edge case

- ensureState() at every entry point (loads MRU from storage if worker restarted)
- buildTabList always fills from window tabs when MRU is stale/short
- Always re-inject content script (fixes stale context after extension reload)
- Verify sendMessage response, fall back to popup window if overlay fails
- commandLock prevents race conditions from rapid key presses
- Filter out cross-window stale tab IDs from MRU
- onInstalled seeds MRU with all existing tabs
- Every failure path falls through to popup window — never silently fails
